name: noteflow-monorepo
description: NoteFlow: AI-powered notes workspace with productivity insights

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd apps/web && npm run dev" "cd apps/api && npm run start:dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:web: cd apps/web && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build:api: cd apps/api && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.lint: cd apps/web && npm run lint && cd ../api && npm run lint
